events.title: Sound of Water
events.description: Water has long shaped life in Japan. As an island nation surrounded by the sea and nourished by abundant rainfall, Japan depends on water for its fertile landscapes and rich food sources. In contemporary Japanese art, water continues to be a powerful theme. Sound of Water: Feminine Expressions of Fluidity features paintings, prints, and sculptures […]

events.description: In-Person Program Learn how to build healthy habits by gamifying your life. Decorate a journal to track your points and progress. For teens ages 12 - 18

events.title: Bug Hotel
events.description: In-Person Program Learn about bugs and their important roles in Earth's ecosystem and build a bug hotel to observe them in nature. For ages 5 - 12. Join our free game for all ages! Earn badges and prizes as you log reading & activities. Visit LACountyLibrary.org/Summer-Discovery to learn more and sign up!

events.title: Code Your Path with Ozobots
events.description: In-Person Program Get ready for a fun, hands-on tech adventure at the library! In this exciting program, school-age kids will explore Ozobots, tiny robots that follow lines and respond to color codes.
